name: QA 187
description:
PCP QA Test No. 187

for bug #327288 - $PCP_RC_DIR/pcp blows away $PCP_TMP_DIR/pmlogger entries



Note ... this will be a "sometimes" failure ... requires special

combinations of pids such that sort != sort -n and comm gets confused

$PCP_RC_DIR/pcp
